title: Core Survival Agent Foundations

determinism.detail: Fixed-seed runtime produces a stable 4-cycle execution summary.

persistence.detail: Runtime snapshot contains agent state and episodic memory after execution.

self_model.detail: Resource exhaustion and fatal faults are classified through the self model.

memory.detail: High-surprise episodes are stored while low-value low-error ticks are skipped.

sleep.detail: Sleep extracts reusable rules and reduces surprise on repeat exposure.

narrative.detail: Narrative episodes compile deterministically and ingest into episodic memory with provenance.

regression.detail: Core pre-M2 regression suites remain green in this round.

findings.label: reconstructed_spec
findings.detail: No authored M1 milestone spec/report was found in the repository. This acceptance bundle is reconstructed from README-described core architecture and the earliest core regression tests.

residual_risks: The original authored M1 contract is absent, so this pass only applies to the reconstructed minimal M1 scope.
